content.full_text:
RUSSELL KIESSIG
P.O. Box 115
Avila Beach, California 93424

November 2, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Sirs,

This may be nothing at all, however, I was quite startled to note
that my middle initial was incorrectly entered on my absentee
ballot.

I was and am concerned that this would interfere with the validity of my ballot.

I did call the County Elections department at the San Luis Obispo
County Clerks office and spoke to a Ms. Halsey who said the error
was of no consequence and that my ballot would not be affected.

San Luis Obispo County staff has (in years past) sometimes been
rather partisan in political campaigns.

Please advise.

Very truly yours,

Russell Kiessig

RK/ch


[illegible]

RUSSELL W KIESSIG
PO BOX 115
AVILA BEACH CA 93424-0115

CON 082 BT007 REF ZE94340 31B

VOTER
MUST
COMPLETE
AND
SIGN

X

Written Signature

Residence Address as Registered

City or Town, State, Zip Code

Date and Place of Signing

IDENTIFICATION/RETURN ENVELOPE
TO BE OPENED ONLY BY CANVASSING BOARD
YOUR VOTED ABSENTEE BALLOT MUST BE RECEIVED AT ANY POLLING PLACE OR BY
THE ELECTION OFFICIAL NO LATER THAN THE CLOSE OF POLLS ON ELECTION DAY.

OFFICIAL ELECTION BALLOTING MATERIAL

40-E892 (11-80)

ABSENT VOTER'S BALLOT

FRANCIS M. COONEY COUNTY CLERK-RECORDER
ELECTION DIVISION
1009 MONTEREY STREET
SAN LUIS OBISPO CA 93408-2509

PLACE
STAMP
HERE

I was and am concerned that this would interfere with the validity of my ballot. I did call the County Elections department at the San Luis Obispo County Clerks office and spoke to a Ms. Halsey who said the error was of no consequence and that my ballot would not be affected. San Luis Obispo County staff has (in years past) sometimes been rather partisan in political campaigns. Please advise. Very truly yours, Russell Kiessig RK/ch The image you provided is completely white, with no visible content or text. If you have another image or a different question, please provide it for better results. This image shows an absentee voter's ballot envelope for the election. The envelope is addressed to Russell W. Kiessig, with the following details: - Name: Russell W. Kiessig - Address: PO Box 115, Avila Beach, CA 93424-0115 - Election code: CON 082 BT007 REP Z894340 31B The envelope contains instructions and fields for the voter to fill out, including: - Written Signature - Residence Address as Registered - City or Town, State, Zip Code - Date and Place of Signing There is also a section for the return envelope to be opened only by the canvassing board, with instructions that the voted absentee ballot must be received at any polling place or by the election official no later than the close of polls on election day. The envelope is labeled as "Official Election Balloting Material" and is from Francis M. Cooney County Clerk-Recorder, Election Division, 1009 Monterey Street, San Luis Obispo, CA 93408-2509. The envelope is marked with a stamp area for postage and has a blue checkmark in the upper left corner, indicating it has been processed.
